name: Acute Pericarditis
description: 25yo male with sharp pleuritic chest pain relieved by leaning forward — post-viral pericarditis

symptoms.text: 25-year-old male with sharp pleuritic chest pain worsened by inspiration and supine position, relieved by leaning forward. Onset 3 days after upper respiratory infection. Low-grade fever (38.2°C). No significant past medical history. No family history of cardiac disease.
symptoms.chief_complaint: Sharp pleuritic chest pain, worse supine, relieved leaning forward

ecg.st_segment: Diffuse ST-segment elevation with PR depression
ecg.interpretation: Diffuse concave-up ST elevation with PR depression consistent with acute pericarditis
